7.2.2025

Heini Lassus

Antti Loimaala

Helka Parviainen

Mikko Loukovaara

Clinical Associates

Research Program in Systems Oncology

ONCOSYS

Basics

Faculty of Medicine
Medicum, Clinicum and Research Programs Unit (RPU)
Research Program in Systems Oncology = ONCOSYS
ONCOSYS is a research program within the RPU i.e., Research Programs Unit
Web page: https://www.helsinki.fi/en/faculty-medicine/research/research-programs-unit 
ONCOSYS web page: https://www.helsinki.fi/en/researchgroups/research-program-in-systems-oncology 

Publication affiliation:
Research Program in Systems Oncology, Research Programs Unit, Faculty of Medicine, University of Helsinki

7.2.2025

Flamma and Helpdesk

https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en
A lot of information about the University of Helsinki, Faculty of Medicine and the Research Programs Unit
Learning to use it will save you a lot of time

Helpdesk: https://helpdesk.it.helsinki.fi/en 
Username application form
Confidential email
Printing at the university (also: admin-meilahti@helsinki.fi)

7.2.2025

Biomedicum intra

https://biomedicumfi.sharepoint.com/ 
Important to register as a user here first: https://accessrequestform.azurewebsites.net/ 
Information about Biomedicum
Safety, keys
Waste management
News and events
Research services
Meeting facilities
Real estate services (something broke?)
Renovation info (BMH1 building tech infra renovation is comming soon)
Safe handling of liquid nitrogen
The next Safe handling of liquid nitrogen -training will be held on Wed 3rd of April at 9 AM. Please register to emilia.carlsson@biomedicum.fi if you want to participate.

7.2.2025

HR-personnel

Found in Flamma
https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/laaketieteellinen-tiedekunta/yhteystiedot-ja-palvelutiimi

7.2.2025

Research Programs Unit

RPU secretaries Anne Simola and Maaria Puupponen can help you with general issues, especially important when I am unavailabe:


Office supplies in the 2nd floor A-wing
You need your keycard for entering
Trusted Persons (https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/laaketieteellinen-tiedekunta/tutkimusohjelmayksikko#menu6) 
RPU Trusted Persons can help you in all wellbeing related matters. 
All discussions are confidential and you are free to contact anyone, please see the contact details below.
Please note! Erika Hagan Brown on maternity leave May 19, 2023 onwards.
wellbeing-rpu@helsinki.fi

7.2.2025

Research Programs Unit

The RPU organizes events, such as RPU Mölkky competititon, RPU Science day and X-mas party, which have been hugely popular. Check your emails for the details
Different hobby groups: 
E.g. Yoga, board games, dancing, floorball, running, knitting etc.
Science Basement (afternoons@thesciencebasement.org)
More information on: https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/laaketieteellinen-tiedekunta/tutkimusohjelmayksikko#menu5

7.2.2025

Occupational health

Occupational Health is organized by Mehiläinen
Our own nurse is in Haartman instiutue and can be reached by email or by visiting her office: 
Leena Sartokoski leena.sartokoski@mehilainen.fi
Work related accident: https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/henkilostoasiat/tyotapaturma

7.2.2025

In case of emergency

Emergency shower in the coffee corner, room B321
Small first aid products (like band aids etc) on the wall between Hautaniemi and Vähärautio offices B316a-B317a
Defibrillator next to the info desk in the entrance of Biomedicum 1.
Fire extinguisher in the B-wing small kitchen

7.2.2025

Safety

ONCOSYS 3rd floor first aid kit and a fire blanket is located on the wall between B316a and B317a rooms. A fire extinguisher is in the common space B321 and in the kitchen outside the ONCOSYS space. - The emergency shower is in the common space B321. - Eye wash bottles can be found in the room B314b (outside our space). - Biomedicum defibrillator can be found in next to the info point in the entrance of the building. - Biomedicum’s emergency plan (in English) can be found in the Orientation-folder in the coffee corner (room B321). The emergency plan can be read online in Biomedicum intra: https://biomedicumfi.sharepoint.com/SitePages/Emergency-Plan.aspx - University of Helsinki safety issues (incl. occupational safety and security etc.) in Flamma: https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/turvallisuus

7.2.2025

Meeting rooms

Meeting room Kuutti in 3rd floor – booking trough Outlook calendar (app)
Help to book via Outlook app: https://helpdesk.it.helsinki.fi/en/instructions/collaboration-and-publication/booking-meeting-room-outlook 
Meeting rooms in 2nd or 3rd floor of BMH1: Anatomy and Pharmacology meeting rooms can only bee booked if your PI has an affiliation to Medicum. Anne Simola can book the room for you.

7.2.2025

Wet lab

Liquid nitrogen training 
Lab engineers can help with problems e.g. related to lab equipment: ltdk-labengineers@helsinki.fi 
Check that your vaccinations are up to date before starting to work with patient samples
Contact your lab technician for more details on wet-lab issues

7.2.2025

BSc, MSc, and PhD students

PhD: https://studies.helsinki.fi/instructions/search#doctoral_candidates 
Fuksiwiki: https://fuksiwiki.tko-aly.fi/Fuksiwiki 
Fuksiwiki PhD students: https://fuksiwiki.tko-aly.fi/PhD_Student_FAQ

7.2.2025

ONCOSYS Program

There are 148 persons in ONCOSYS as of January 2024
13 PI’s, 3 Clinical associates
ONCOSYS yearly symposium 
ONCOSYS Progress Report Seminar about once a month
ONCOSYS activities:
Happy hours on Fridays at 16 in the coffee corner
Rowing in Töölö
Other outdoor activities about once or twice a year.

7.2.2025

ONCOSYS space

Coffee corner B321: coffee machine, sofa for meetings and to hang out, Happy hours
3rd floor space: Offices and wet lab in: B316-B326
Common wet lab B324a
Freezer space and copy/printing machine B320a. 
Temperature in room B320a
https://www.wh-observer.de/ User name: ONCOSYS Password: OncosysB320
Haartman institute: Liquid nitrogen freezers: keys and LN training trough me or the lab engineers.

7.2.2025

Mailing lists and Slack Pro

The University of Helsinki’s mailing lists:
grp-yourgroup@helsinki.fi (except Rannikko: group-rannikko@helsinki.fi)
Managed by your lab tech, me or Maaria Puupponen (RPU secretary maaria.puupponen@helsinki.fi). Once you’re on the group list, you are automatically in oncosys-all and rpu-all –mailing lists.
Please notify me of your new employees
ONCOSYS has a Slack Pro channel, i.e., the messages will not get deleted and one can make open or private chanells for your research group or your research subject
GraphPad Prism 
If you need a new licence, ask me about the details: karen.ahlnas@helsinki.fi

7.2.2025

Faculty level activities

Suomikahvit – for all the employees and also for those who are grant students! 
Practice your Finnish, however beginner you might be 
If you want to participate, please send a message to heikki.kononen@helsinki.fi for the meeting schedule.
The meeting place is Biomedicum 1 lunch restaurant. The table will have a small Finnish flag. There will also always be 1-2 Finnish teachers present!
https://flamma.helsinki.fi/en/group/ajankohtaista/news/-/uutinen/suomikahvit-autumn-2024/38248347

7.2.2025

Questions?

My contact info:

Karen Ahlnäs 
Research Program Coordinator 
 Biomedicum Helsinki 1, room A330b1  
Phone: +358 50 472 8052 / +358 2941 25409 
(Part-time working hours, mostly available on Wed-Fri, ONCOSYS Office hours Fridays at 12-14)

7.2.2025
